title: S3 general purpose buckets should block public access
description: This control checks whether an Amazon S3 general purpose bucket blocks public access at the bucket level. The control fails if any of the following settings are set to false: ignorePublicAcls, blockPublicPolicy, blockPublicAcls, restrictPublicBuckets. (+2 related finding(s))
what_is_wrong: This control checks whether an Amazon S3 general purpose bucket blocks public access at the bucket level. The control fails if any of the following settings are set to false: ignorePublicAcls, blockPublicPolicy, blockPublicAcls, restrictPublicBuckets. (+2 related finding(s))
what_the_fix_does: Adds bucket-level public access blocks to prevent public ACL/policy exposure.

findings.title: S3 general purpose buckets should block public access
S3 general purpose buckets should block public write access
S3 general purpose buckets should block public read access

recommendation.rationale: Matrix cell risk_high__criticality_high maps to default recommendation 'exception_review'. Risk is high and business criticality is high. Criticality evidence: data_sensitivity=0.80, privilege_level=0.60, internet_exposure=0.90, matched_signals=none. Relationship context is incomplete, so the recommendation remains conservative and advisory unless policy overrides it.

execution_guidance.label: Block public access on bucket
